message:
feat(policy,verifier_economy): add structured gate check results, transition receipts, and attestation signature verification

compat_gates.rs:
- Expose domain constants as pub(crate) for cross-module use
- Add COMPAT_TRANSITION_RECEIPT_DOMAIN and COMPAT_DIVERGENCE_RECEIPT_DOMAIN
  constants for new receipt types
- Enhance check_compatibility() to populate reason_codes, attenuation_trace,
  scope_delta, freshness_state, recovery_hints, and explanation_digest in
  GateCheckResult using the full proof metadata infrastructure
- Add per-predicate freshness validation with structured deny reasons
  and recovery hints for stale predicates
- Add scope-widening detection with POLICY_COMPAT_SCOPE_WIDENING reason code

compatibility_gate.rs:
- Replace placeholder 64-char hex signature checks with real Ed25519
  verification using verify_ed25519_canonical from compat_gates
- Add CompatibilityProofMetadata to CompatibilityTransition and
  TransitionReceipt structs for structured audit trails
- Add freshness_state tracking to TransitionReceipt
- Integrate sign_ed25519_canonical for transition receipt signing
- Add structured reason codes and recovery hints to gate decisions

verifier_economy.rs:
- Replace !signature.is_empty() attestation auth with real Ed25519
  verification using verify_ed25519_signature_hex and the structured
  attestation_signature_payload preimage
- Add capsule integrity verification via compute_capsule_integrity_hash
  with constant-time comparison at register and retrieve time
- Restructure test fixtures to use real signing keys and signature
  generation for all attestation and capsule tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
